rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex terminators
Do not introduce new identifiers or references in repairs
generic_rules: Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Use only visible identifiers in repairs
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in repairs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not introduce new identifiers or references in repairs
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about missing EOF at 'annex'
